case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $14,210.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-04-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
DECLARATION OF PAMELA A. UNDERWOOD REGARDING STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

NTC OF MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF SHIRLEY HU;, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION RE: 22485 FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR MAY-04-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
CLAIM OPPOSING FORFEITURE FILED BY CLAIMANT HU, SHIRLEY

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF SHIRLEY HU ONLY IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 1, 2011 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998
LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM OF SHIRLEY HU SET FOR JUN-01-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR PER REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $14,210.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
